text:
Created attachment 249132
core.txt.0

Hi there. I recently came across this as well. I have a strong feeling that this is related to amdgpu. The attached dump was taken from a machine that had Radeon RX 560 GPU. Unfortunately, all my other crash dumps (they were different) were lost. A few days ago I replaced that GPU with Radeon RX 6400. No crashes since then.

$ dmesg | head
